```{r}
    color = "#333333",
    weight = 1,
    highlightOptions = highlightOptions(
      weight = 2,
      color = "#000000",
      fillOpacity = 0.9,
      bringToFront = TRUE
    ),
    label = ~paste0(
      "<strong>", acname, "</strong><br>",
      "<strong>Intensity:</strong> ", ifelse(is.na(Intensity), "Not set", Intensity), " (", ifelse(Intensity == 0, "No damage", paste0("Category ", Intensity)), ")"
    ) %>% lapply(htmltools::HTML),
    labelOptions = labelOptions(style = list("font-weight" = "normal", padding = "8px 12px"), textsize = "12px", direction = "auto")
  ) %>%
  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    pal = pal_intensity,
    values = ~Intensity,
    title = "Cyclone<br>Intensity",
    opacity = 0.7,
    labFormat = labelFormat(digits = 0)
  ) %>%
  setView(lng = 167.5, lat = -16, zoom = 6)
```

**Map above:** Assigned cyclone intensity per Area Council. Use this to verify your manual overlay matches expectations. Councils in grey have no intensity assigned.

```{r}
# === EXPORT INTENSITY GEOJSON & SHAPEFILE ===
# Area councils with Intensity and intensity_color for GIS / MIS use
intensity_colors <- c("0" = "#cccccc", "2" = "#fbbf24", "3" = "#f97316", "4" = "#dc2626", "5" = "#7f1d1d")
intensity_map_sf <- intensity_map_sf %>%
  mutate(intensity_color = replace_na(intensity_colors[as.character(as.integer(Intensity))], "#cccccc")) %>%
  st_simplify(dTolerance = 0.01, preserveTopology = TRUE)
dir.create(here::here("output"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
st_write(intensity_map_sf, here::here("output", "area_councils_intensity.geojson"), delete_dsn = TRUE, quiet = TRUE)
st_write(intensity_map_sf, here::here("output", "area_councils_intensity.shp"), delete_dsn = TRUE, quiet = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# === VALIDATE EXPORTED CSV FILES ===

validate_csv <- function(filepath) {
  if (!file.exists(filepath)) return(data.frame(File = basename(filepath), Issue = "File not found", Pass = FALSE))
  
  df <- read.csv(filepath, check.names = FALSE)
  issues <- character()
  
  numeric_cols <- df %>% select(where(is.numeric))
  
  if (any(numeric_cols < 0, na.rm = TRUE)) {
    issues <- c(issues, "Negative values")
  }
  if (any(is.na(numeric_cols))) {
    issues <- c(issues, paste0("NA values (", sum(is.na(numeric_cols)), ")"))
  }
  
  if (length(issues) == 0) {
    return(data.frame(File = basename(filepath), Issue = "✓ Pass", Pass = TRUE))
  } else {
    return(data.frame(File = basename(filepath), Issue = paste(issues, collapse = "; "), Pass = FALSE))
  }
}

# Get all output CSVs, excluding QC files (they may have NAs by design)
output_files <- list.files(here::here("output"), pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
output_files <- output_files[!grepl("^QC_", basename(output_files))]

# Validate each
validation_results <- lapply(output_files, validate_csv) %>% bind_rows()

# Add Download column with link to each file
validation_results <- validation_results %>%
  mutate(
    Download = sprintf(
      '<a href="output/%s" download="%s" style="padding: 4px 12px; background: #0c55a4; color: white; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 12px;">Download</a>',
      File, File
    )
  )

# Determine overall pass/fail
output_validation_pass <- all(validation_results$Pass)

if (output_validation_pass) {
  message("✓ All output files passed validation")
} else {
  warning("⚠️ Some output files have issues")
}

# Display detailed results
reactable(
  validation_results %>% select(File, Issue, Download),
  columns = list(
    File = colDef(name = "Output File", minWidth = 300),
    Issue = colDef(name = "Status", minWidth = 150),
    Download = colDef(name = "Download", minWidth = 100, html = TRUE)
  ),
  striped = TRUE,
  bordered = TRUE,
  filterable = TRUE
)

# === MANUAL REVIEW SAMPLE EXPORT ===

# Compile key metrics for sampled councils (with exists() checks in case a sector chunk failed)
manual_review_parts <- list()
if (exists("education_aggregated") && exists("qc_sample_councils")) {
  manual_review_parts[[length(manual_review_parts) + 1]] <- education_aggregated %>%
    filter(Region %in% qc_sample_councils) %>%
    select(Region, starts_with("ecce_"), starts_with("primary_")) %>%
    mutate(Sector = "Education", .before = 1)
}
if (exists("shelter_damage_ordered") && exists("qc_sample_councils")) {
  manual_review_parts[[length(manual_review_parts) + 1]] <- shelter_damage_ordered %>%
    filter(Region %in% qc_sample_councils) %>%
    mutate(Sector = "Shelter Damage", .before = 1)
}
if (exists("health_financial_ordered") && exists("qc_sample_councils")) {
  manual_review_parts[[length(manual_review_parts) + 1]] <- health_financial_ordered %>%
    filter(Region %in% qc_sample_councils) %>%
    mutate(Sector = "Health Financial", .before = 1)
}
manual_review <- if (length(manual_review_parts) > 0) bind_rows(manual_review_parts) else data.frame()

if (nrow(manual_review) > 0) {
  write.csv(manual_review, here::here("output", "QC_manual_review_sample.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  message("📁 Manual review sample exported to output/QC_manual_review_sample.csv")
} else {
  message("⚠️ Manual review sample skipped (required sector data not available)")
}

# === QC SUMMARY TABLE ===

qc_summary <- data.frame(
  Check = c("Area Councils recognized", 
            "No capitalization issues",
            "Config-baseline alignment",
            "Required baseline completeness",
            "Intensity assignments valid",
            "Output file validation"),
  Status = c(
    ifelse(length(unrecognized) == 0, "✓ Pass", "⚠️ Issues"),
    ifelse(length(potential_dupes) == 0, "✓ Pass", "⚠️ Issues"),
    ifelse(length(missing_baseline) == 0, "✓ Pass", "⚠️ Issues"),
    ifelse(baseline_completeness_pass, "✓ Pass", "⚠️ Issues"),
    ifelse(intensity_validation_pass, "✓ Pass", "⚠️ Issues"),
    ifelse(output_validation_pass, "✓ Pass", "⚠️ Issues")
  )
)

reactable(
  qc_summary,
  columns = list(
    Check = colDef(name = "Quality Check", minWidth = 250),
    Status = colDef(name = "Status", minWidth = 100)
  ),
  striped = TRUE,
  bordered = TRUE
)

# === CREATE ZIP OF ALL OUTPUT FILES ===
output_zip <- here::here("vanuatu_outputs.zip")
output_csvs <- list.files(here::here("output"), pattern = "\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
if (length(output_csvs) > 0) {
  if (file.exists(output_zip)) file.remove(output_zip)
  zip(output_zip, files = output_csvs, extras = "-j")  # -j strips paths, stores flat
}
```

# 14. Download All Output

All output CSV files (including QC files) have been bundled into a single zip archive. **Save `vanuatu_outputs.zip` alongside `index.html` when sharing** so the link works for recipients.

<a href="vanuatu_outputs.zip" download="vanuatu_outputs.zip" style="display: inline-block; padding: 10px 20px; background-color: #0c55a4; color: white; text-decoration: none; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: bold;">⬇ Download all output (ZIP)</a>
